entries.name: coaching-notify-cert-expiring
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:00 UTC: fire CoachCertificationExpiringSoon at configured cadence (90 / 30 / 7 days pre-expiry).

entries.name: coaching-notify-cert-expired
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:05 UTC: fire CoachCertificationExpired for certs past expires_at.

entries.name: coaching-notify-assignment-ending-soon
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:10 UTC: fire CoachAssignmentEndingSoon for assignments within N days of end_date (default 7).

entries.name: coaching-notify-availability-conflict
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:15 UTC: recheck existing assignments against updated coach availability + rescheduled sessions.

entries.name: coaching-purge-expired-skill-ratings
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC: soft-delete ratings past expires_at + hard-purge ratings past retention window (2y default / 5y with coaching_extended_retention).

entries.name: coaching-generate-roster-report
entries.purpose: Weekly Monday 06:00 UTC: per-branch active coach roster export + notification to branch_manager + admin.
